description: Assign uniform applied pressure f to all liner elements in the range. Positive pressure acts in the positive \(z\) -direction of the element system and maintains this orientation during large-strain motion.

6.0.description: Assign uniform applied pressure f to all liner elements in the range. Positive pressure acts in the positive z-direction of the element system and maintains this orientation during large-strain motion.

7.0.description: Assign uniform applied pressure f to all liner elements in the range. Positive pressure acts in the positive \(z\)-direction of the element system and maintains this orientation during large-strain motion.
